metrics.rework_rate_note: 2.8% — slight increase from 2.1%, still well within acceptable range

hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Sprint 16 used the 3-phase process for a hardening sprint (refactoring + test coverage recovery + smoke tests). Different task type than feature sprints, still followed the same THINK/EXECUTE/SHIP workflow successfully.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: All 4 gates passed on first run. Continuous gate runs during implementation prevented regressions during the shared base extraction refactor. 121 tests passing, 0 lint errors.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 H7 instructions audited and passed. Existing tests survived refactor without modification (production-engineer). Interface isolation maintained (architect). Input validation preserved through refactor (security-auditor). Sprint scope fit single sprint (product-manager). Public API preserved (ux-designer).

hypotheses.name: Coverage gate catches regressions
hypotheses.evidence: Nodestate coverage recovered from 86.0% to 94.6% with 5 targeted tests. New shared base package at 78.9%. Overall coverage ~93%.

hypotheses.name: Flowstate works for greenfield projects
hypotheses.evidence: Sprint 16 is the 17th sprint (0-16). Project has 121 unit tests + 22 smoke tests, 4 binaries, 3 milestones complete, and now a hardened codebase with reduced duplication.
